children.text: A slipcast ceramic petal tray glazed in soft pink and white, designed to add a delicate, sculptural touch to your table or vanity. The gently curved form is perfect for serving condiments, dipping sauces, olives, tea bags, or small bites, making it a charming addition to dinner parties, charcuterie boards, and everyday meals.

Beyond the table, this versatile stoneware tray doubles as a jewelry dish for rings and earrings or a catchall for small essentials. Both decorative and functional, the handmade ceramic design brings subtle color, texture, and artisan craftsmanship to any space.
A small bottle perfect for broth, soy sauce, salad dressings, cooking oils, or dairy like half and half for coffee service, or milk for cereal and tea. Cork included.
Its compact size makes it easy to handle at the table while adding a thoughtful, handmade touch to everyday meals and gatherings.
A square wheel-thrown and altered mug designed for coffee and tea lovers alike. The softly defined corners give the form a distinctive silhouette while maintaining a comfortable grip in hand.

Decorated with a pink and white design created using a wax resist technique, each mug carries subtle variation and layered detail. Crafted from durable stoneware, it’s a functional yet expressive piece made to elevate your daily coffee or tea ritual. Cared for well, it will warm your hands for many winters to come.
